subject: GRB 100407A : Errata of afterglow position in GCN 11899
body:
GRB 100407A : Errata of afterglow position in GCN 11899

C.J. Chuang, C.S. Lin, Y. Urata (NCU) and K.Y. Huang (ASIAA) on behalf 
of the EAFON cooperation: 

We made a typo on optical afterglow position reported in GCN 11899.
The correct afterglow position is 
RA(J2000) = 12:24:07.534, with 1" error 
Dec(J2000) = +15:42:42.63,with 1" error 

We apologize for the possible inconvenience.
